document_identity.principal_address: 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102

initial_investment.note: Hilton does not yet have actual initial investment data for Graduate hotels developed in their system.

territory.restrictive_period: Shorter than franchise term, tied to years from approval date

contract_terms.relicensing: At franchisor's sole discretion; materially different terms possible

franchisor_without_cause: Casualty (if franchisee elects not to rebuild)
termination.liquidated_damages_post_opening_early: Greater of (Avg Monthly Royalty × 60) or ($11,200 × rooms)

permitted_transfers_no_consent: Institutional fund if same asset manager

noncompete.during_term: May not own/be licensor/franchisor of competing brand. May own minority interest or be franchisee/non-exclusive manager of competitor.

dispute_resolution.venue: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Virginia (Alexandria); or state court in Fairfax County, VA, or New York, NY

item19_financial_performance.note: Franchisor explicitly states it does not make any representations about future financial performance or past performance of company-owned or franchised outlets.

item20_outlet_data.note: All 32 outlets converted from Project Alpha by Hilton in 2024. 34 total US franchises (2 not yet open).

item21_financial_statements.entity_scope: Hilton Franchise Holding LLC (ALL Hilton brands, not just Graduate)
item21_financial_statements.debt_guarantee: All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt (maturing 2025–2033)
item21_financial_statements.tax_status: Disregarded entity for US income tax purposes

litigation_summary.key_pending: Multiple antitrust class actions re: IDeaS/Amadeus/STR revenue management software and hotel room pricing
litigation_summary.key_concluded: Texas AG ($2.1M) and Nebraska AG ($300K) settlements re: mandatory guest fee disclosure

risk_flags.no_item19: No financial performance representations at $18.7M–$91.1M investment level
risk_flags.no_renewal_right: Franchise is non-renewable; re-licensing at sole discretion with materially different terms
risk_flags.non_exclusive_territory: No protected territory by default; Restricted Area negotiable but limited in duration and heavily carved out
risk_flags.new_brand_under_hilton: Graduate brand acquired May 2024; no established track record under Hilton system
risk_flags.all_outlets_converted: All 32 outlets are conversions from Project Alpha, not organic Graduate developments
risk_flags.franchisor_entity_covers_all_brands: Financial statements reflect ALL Hilton brands; Graduate-specific financials not disclosed
risk_flags.debt_collateral_pledge: All franchisor assets pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt
risk_flags.antitrust_class_actions: Multiple pending class actions alleging hotel industry price-fixing through revenue management software

unresolveds.description: Financial statements Note 9 references 'March 18, 2024' as subsequent events evaluation date — likely typo for March 18, 2025
Item 20 footnote says '34 franchises in the US' but only 32 at end of 2024 — 2 are signed-but-not-opened (Texas)
Financial statements cover ALL Hilton brands; Graduate-specific revenue/profitability not separately disclosed
Monthly Program Fee spending breakdown not audited or disclosed to franchisees
Hilton does not yet have actual initial investment data for Graduate hotels developed in their system — Item 7 estimates based on general Hilton experience

contradictions.description: Item 20 Table 3 shows 32 franchised hotels at end of 2024; footnote references 34 US franchises
contradictions.resolution_status: RESOLVED — 34 total franchises, 32 were open/operational. 2 signed but not yet opened (Texas).

contradictions.description: Exhibit C Note 9 references 'March 18, 2024' as subsequent events evaluation date vs. financial statements for year ended December 31, 2024
contradictions.resolution_status: UNRESOLVED — likely typographical error (should be March 18, 2025). Does not affect substance.
